scraped_snippet: JOB POSTING: BUSCAMOS CUIDADORES (CNA/PCA) BILINGUES EN STONE MOUNTAIN, GA – MEDIO TIEMPO (TURNO DIURNO) - CONTRATACIÓN INMEDIATA - HORARIO: FINES DE SEMANA. Employer: Caring Hands United, Inc.. Location: Pine Lake, DeKalb County. Salary: $41,119/yr (estimated). Details: ¿Estás buscando una carrera gratificante donde puedas marcar la diferencia en la vida de otras personas?. Si es así, una carrera como cuidador(a) de atención en el hogar puede ser perfecta para ti. Estamos buscando personas motivadas y compasivas, con ganas de aprender y crecer en este campo tan gratificante, para trabajar con clientes en el área de Alpharetta, Georgia. Como cuidador(a) de atención en el hogar, brindarás servicios esenciales para ayudar a personas mayores y personas con discapa…
description: **Caring Hands United** is looking for bilingual (Spanish-English) CNAs and PCAs for part-time weekend daytime shifts in the Stone Mountain and Alpharetta areas. The work involves in-home care for seniors and individuals with disabilities. Good fit for a compassionate caregiver who wants weekend-only hours and can serve Spanish-speaking clients.

scraped_snippet: JOB POSTING: PT Hairstylist/Barber. Employer: Southeast Clips. Location: Doraville, DeKalb County. Salary: $106,230/yr (estimated). Details: Full or Part-time hair stylist. High volume salon, flexible hours, established customer base We are the largest Great Clips franchisee in the country. Something that makes us a little different is that we strive to have the highest " effective wage " in the market (base wage  productivity  product commissions  tips). Last week the average effective wage of our staff was $31.26/hr.* Some make a little less, some make substantially more. It all just depends on how proficient you are, but no one i…
description: **Southeast Clips** (Great Clips' largest franchisee in the country) is hiring full and part-time hair stylists in Doraville, with flexible hours and an established customer base. The snippet notes last week's average effective wage across staff was $31.26 per hour, factoring in base pay, productivity, product commissions, and tips. High-volume shop with upside based on how fast you are.

description: **Emory Healthcare** has another Environmental Services Technician opening in Atlanta. Day-one health benefits, student loan repayment assistance, and ongoing mentorship are part of the package. A solid entry-level path into one of Atlanta's largest healthcare systems.
